boundary_binding.action_boundary: May treasury execute the funds movement or cash-management action now? Focus: bank portal admin approval.

final_answer: The action cannot proceed yet. Source records keep the exact boundary open because the current treasury admin and signer matrix match is unresolved. Policy requires current source authority to close the boundary before any funds movement or bank portal admin approval can execute.
